ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year_released" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "imdb_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the movie on IMDb */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the movie */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year of birth of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the actor */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the actor's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_actors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character" TEXT /* Character played by the actor in the movie */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the actor in the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "favorite_movies" TEXT /* Favorite movies of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Optional review text */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was written */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the review was written */,
  "helpfulness_rating" REAL /* Helpfulness rating of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Rank of the movie on IMDb
Runtime of the movie in minutes
Year of birth of the director
URL of the director's profile picture
Year of birth of the actor
URL of the actor's profile picture
Character played by the actor in the movie

ID of the user giving the rating
ID of the movie being rated
Rating value given by the user
Timestamp when the rating was given
IP address of the user when the rating was given
